name: medication-list-panel
title: Medication List Panel
description: The medication list as a panel — interaction warnings on top, then active prescriptions, with an optional adherence ring in the header. Composes WidgetPanel + PrescriptionCard + DrugInteractionAlert + AdherenceRing.

props.name: interactions
props.description: Interaction warnings shown above the list.

props.name: adherence
props.description: Adherence summary shown in the header.

clinicalNotes: Interaction warnings render ABOVE the med list, not buried beside a drug, because an interaction is a property of the combination and must be seen before acting on any single order. Adherence lives in the header as an at-a-glance ring — low adherence reframes 'treatment failure' as 'not taken', a critical distinction before escalating therapy. Keep discontinued meds out of the active list (or clearly separated) to avoid dosing from a stopped order.
notes: Layer-M2 panel. Client component. Feeds the Patient Chart, Consumer, and Medication Management blocks.
